This procedure removes inactive users and logs the changes.
We begin by declaring a variable to hold error codes.
A transaction starts to ensure data consistency throughout.
The status_log table records each user_id and their former status.
Modification_date is set to the current system timestamp.
We delete rows where the status column equals Inactive.
Any errors during deletion are captured for review.
The transaction rolls back if an exception occurs.
Successful deletions commit the changes permanently.
The total count of removed records is returned.
Error messages are displayed if the process fails.
racecar
